More benefits than ever before 
Spend Benefits
  * Earn up to 3% CashPoints on Paytm spends


Security Benefits
  * Zero cost liability on lost card reporting


Membership Benefits
  * Get Paytm First Membership as a welcome benefit


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card#a "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits 
CashBack Benefits
  * 3% CashPoints on Paytm spends (Recharge, Utility, Movies & Mini App).
  * 2% CashPoints on select Paytm spends.
  * 1% CashPoints on all retail spends.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card "View More")
![Paytm Business Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
Membership Benefits
  * Paytm First Membership on first transaction (valid till 10th Sep 2024.
  * ₹250 Gift Voucher on activation
  * ₹500 Gift Voucher on spending ₹1 lakh in a year


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card "View More")
![Paytm Business Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * 1% Fuel Surcharge Waiver
  * Up to 20% Discount on partner restaurants via Dineout
  * SmartPay for automated utility bill payments


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
Usage Benefits
  * Contactless Payments for quick and secure transactions
  * Quick Business Loan eligibility check
  * Zero Cost Liability on reporting lost card


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card "View More")

## Save up to ₹18,000 annually*
Just like 33 lakh+ Paytm HDFC Bank Business Credit Cardholders
[Check How ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card/value-chart "Check How")
## Application Process
**Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:**
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Check Eligibility (opens in a new tab)](https://paytm.com/?is_retargeting=true& "Check Eligibility")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know More About the Card
  1. ### Card Management & Controls
  2. ### Reward Programme
  3. ### Credit Accessibility
  4. ### Usage Benefits
  5. ### Welcome Benefit
  6. ### Card Activation
  7. ### Card Controls
  8. ### Fees & Charges
  9. ### Application Channels
  10. ### Important Information
  11. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Management & Controls 
  * **Single Interface  
**One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * **Spends Tracking  
**Simple interface to track all your spends
  * **Reward Points  
**View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Reward Programme 
**CashPoints Benefits:**
  * 3% CashPoints on purchases on Paytm [Recharge + Utility + Movies + Mini App] Max. Cap per Calendar Month - ₹ 500


  * 2% CashPoints on all other Select Paytm Spends. Max. Cap per Calendar Month - ₹ 500


  * 1% CashPoints on all other Retail Spends Max. Cap per Calendar Month - ₹1000


**Redemption Rules:**
  * CashPoints are not applicable for wallet loads, fuel spends, EMI spends, rental spends and education spends.


  * CashPoints can be redeemed as CashBack along with other redemption categories.


  * Effective 1st April 2023, CashPoints for a particular month shall be accrued in your card account in the first week of the subsequent month on a cumulative basis. To know more, [click here.(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card/pytm.pdf)


  * Effective 1st January 2023, CashBack accruals and redemptions have undergone the below mentioned changes.


  * Rental Payments – No CashBack will be given on rental payments


  * Education Spends – No CashBack will be given on education spends


  * Grocery Spends - Accruals on Grocery Spends will be capped at 1000 CashPoints per month 


  * Travel Redemption – Redemption of Travel Reward Points will be capped at 50,000 points per month


  * Effective 1st February 2023, CashBack redemptions have further been modified as under.


  * Overall CashBack redemption will be capped at 3000 points per month. 


  * 70% points + 30% minimum pay system - A minimum of 30% pay system has been introduced for redemption of points on select categories only.


  * **Please Note:** Only the mentioned categories basis the Merchant IDs / Terminal IDs in the list shall be applicable for relevant CashBacks. To view the list, please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card/pytm3.pdf).


![Enjoy Special Discounts and Offers](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Credit Accessibility 
  * **Free credit period:** Avail up to 50 days of interest free credit on your Credit Card.
  * **Quick Loan for Business:** Check for term loan eligibility on your Credit Card for business purposes.


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Usage Benefits 
  * **Utility Bill Payments:** Register your Credit Card with SmartPay, HDFC Bank's Utility Bill payment service. You can then ensure that all your utility bills are paid on time, conveniently and easily.


  * **Zero cost liability:** If you lose your Card, report it immediately to our 24-hour call centre. After reporting the loss, you have zero liability for any fraudulent transactions made on your card.


  * **Fuel Surcharge Waiver:** 1% fuel surcharge waived off on fuel transactions (on minimum transaction of ₹400 & maximum transaction of ₹5,000. Maximum waiver of ₹250 per statement cycle). [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card/pytm2.pdf) to know more on Fuel Surcharge.


  * **Dining Benefit:** Upto 20% discount* on partner restaurants via Dineout while using your HDFC Bank Credit Card.


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Welcome Benefit 
  * **Paytm First Membership:** Paytm First is a premium subscription-based rewards & loyalty program for Paytm users. It offers exclusive benefits, over and above the regular offers. A Paytm First member will enjoy a wide range of exclusive benefits from leading partnered brands. It can be availed upon minimum one transaction of ₹100. 


  * **Please Note:** Paytm First Membership is provided by Paytm. For any queries, please reach out to Paytm Customer Care.


  * This feature won’t be applicable for customers on boarded on or after 10th September 2024.


  * **Activation Benefit:**


  * Enjoy ₹250 worth Gift Voucher upon card activation with 2 transactions in first 30 days. (Non-EMI Spends)


  * Qualified customers will be communicated for availing Gift Vouchers


  * **Milestone Benefit:** Enjoy ₹500 worth Gift Voucher on spends of ₹1 lakh in a year (Non-EMI, Non-Wallet and Non-Rental Spends). Qualified customers will be communicated for availing Gift Vouchers


**Please Note:** This offer is only applicable for 1 year of card issuance.
![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Activation 
**HDFC Bank Credit Card Activation Guidelines:** HDFC Bank Credit Card holders have to activate their Credit Cards within 37 days from Card Open Date, as per ‘Master Direction – Credit and Debit Card – Issuance and Conduct Directions, 2022’ dated April 21, 2022 realized by Reserve bank of India (RBI).
(Details: [rbi.org.in/Scripts/BS_ViewMasDirections.aspx?id=12300(opens in a new tab)](https://rbi.org.in/Scripts/BS_ViewMasDirections.aspx?id=12300))
In case the Credit Card is not activated through one of the below mentioned modes, the Credit Card Account will have to be closed by the Bank as per the Master Direction Guidelines. 
[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/paytm-digital-credit-card-activation-steps) to know more.   
**Modes for Activation:**
  * **Setting Credit Card PIN:**


  * **Through IVR:** Card holders can set their 4-digit Credit Card PIN by calling IVR No. 1860 266 0333. Upon calling the IVR please input your card number, validate through OTP and set your preferred PIN.


  * **Through Net Banking:** Log in to our Net Banking and visit Cards. Choose Change PIN and set your preferred PIN (available only for customers holding savings/salary/current accounts).


  * **SmartPay Registration:** Now add billers to your HDFC Bank Credit Card and register for SmartPay by giving standing instructions on your Credit Card.


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Controls 
  * Paytm HDFC Bank Business Credit Card is enabled for contactless payments, facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets.


  * You can use your Card to make quick transactions at merchant locations accepting contactless Cards.


Enabling your online, contactless and international transactions:
  * Through MyCards: Visit [Mycards.hdfcbank.com(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/) log in through OTP and link your Credit Card. Please click on the "Card Control" tab to enable Online, Contactless and/or International transactions.


  * Through WhatsApp Banking: Please save the number 7070022222 and send a message "Manage My Credit Card" to enable. Alternatively, you can [click here.(opens in a new tab)](https://wa.me/7070022222?text=Manage%20my%20credit%20cards)


  * Through Eva: To interact with Eva, please [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/) and choose your preferred transactions to enable.


  * Through Credit Card usage: Use your Credit Card for at least 1 Online / POS transaction to activate your Credit Card.


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
**Paytm HDFC Bank Business Credit Card Fees and Charges:**
  * **Membership Fee:** ₹ 500 + GST


  * First Year Fee waived upon spending ₹ 30,000 (Non-EMI spends) within the first 90 days


  * Renewal Year Fee waived upon spending ₹ 50,000 (Non-EMI spends) in the 12 months period


**Goods and Services Tax (GST):** Effective 1st July 2017, Goods & Services Tax (GST) is applicable on all Fees, Charges and Interest transactions. The applicable GST would be dependent on place of provision (POP) and place of supply (POS). If POP and POS are in the same state then applicable GST would be CGST and SGST/UTGST else, IGST.
  * GST for Fees & Charges / Interest transactions billed on statement date will be reflected in next month's statement.


  * GST levied will not be reversed on any dispute on Fees & Charges / interest.


  * Effective January 2023, please note the additions below in the Fees and Charges structure.


  * **Rental Payments:** 1% fee will be applicable on rental transactions from the second rental transaction onwards of the same calendar month.


  * **International DCC Transactions:** 1% mark-up fees to be levied on International DCC Transactions
  * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to know about fees & charges


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your Card:
1. Website
  * You can quickly apply online by clicking [here.(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?channelsource=iocl&LGahttps://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_freedom_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online&icid=website_organic_freedom_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online#nbbCode=MKTG)


2. PayZapp App
  * If you have the PayZapp app, just head to the credit card section to get started. Don’t have it yet? [Download(opens in a new tab)](https://v.hdfc.bank.in/payzapp/index.html?id=com.hdfcbank.payzapp&mc_id=pz-microsite&utm_source=PZ-Microsite&utm_medium=CTA&utm_campaign=PZ-Microsite-CTA&utm_id=PZ-Microsite&shortlink=pzmicrosite&c=PZ-Microsite&pid=PZ-Microsite&af_xp=social&source_caller=ui) PayZapp here and apply directly from your phone.


3. NetBanking
  * If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply [log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/) to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.


4. HDFC Bank Branch
  * Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest branch and our staff will help you with the application.


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Important Information 
  * Please [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/business-credit-cards/paytm-hdfc-bank-business-credit-card) to view the new product and feature related information applicable with effect from April 1, 2023.


  * Your Card Member Agreement, Most Important Terms & Conditions and Other Important documents pertaining to your Credit Card can be accessed digitally. [Click here.](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/terms-and-conditions)


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/personal-mitc) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Stay Protected](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
What is Paytm HDFC Bank Business Credit Card?
Paytm HDFC Bank Business Credit Card is a Credit Card exclusive for Paytm customers. Paytm customers can get this card by applying for the card on Paytm app. Paytm is offering this card in partnership with HDFC Bank.
### 
What are the key features of Paytm HDFC Bank Business Credit Card?
  * 3% CashBack on select purchases on Paytm [Recharge + Utility + Movies + Mini App] – Maximum Cap per Calendar Month – ₹500


  * 2% CashBack on all other Paytm Spends – Maximum Cap per Calendar Month – ₹500


  * 1% CashBack on all other spends (except EMI spends, Rental, Fuel, and Education Spends) – Maximum Cap per Calendar Month – ₹1000.


### 
Is there any capping on accrual of CashBacks?
  * For 3% CashBack on select purchases on Paytm [Recharge + Utility + Movies + Mini App] – CashBack accrual capped at ₹500 per calendar month. 


  * For 2% CashBack on all other Paytm Spends – CashBack accrual capped at ₹500 per calendar month. 


  * For 1% CashBack on all other spends (except EMI spends, Rental, Fuel, and Education Spends) – CashBack accrual capped at ₹1000 per month.


### 
How to avail of CashBacks?
CashBack is accrued as CashPoints in your card account, which can be redeemed post statement generation. CashPoints can be redeemed as CashBack along with other redemption categories.
### 
What will happen if your Credit Card is not activated within 37 days?
Your Credit Card will be closed and cannot be used further as per the regulations. Request you to contact us to apply for a new Credit Card in future.
Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/paytm-business-credit-card/pytm4.pdf) to read more frequently asked questions.
